milestone.title: V23
milestone.goal: Every human decision gate presents a transparent synthesized report — the goal it serves, what's been achieved toward it, and the plan ahead — so the human confirms with full sight of the work's arc, not a local snapshot.

report-arc.title: Enrich report-template.md with the goal→achievement→plan decision arc

arc-gate-wiring.title: Wire every human-gate path to render the decision arc

arc-book-align.title: Align the book + GLOSSARY with the decision arc
